description: Lock the July 4 GUI and digital-ad batch to WIMP/HCI evidence and RTB-scoped ad exchange chronology.

checks.reason: This batch only adds edge evidence and does not re-anchor the GUI chronology.
Operating-system shells and window management remain enabling platform context, not a required component for every GUI experiment.
Psychology is retained only as human-factors and user-performance design evidence.
The node is anchored to the cited Right Media Exchange launch rather than the prior broad 1989 web-era placeholder.
E-commerce is market and transaction context for ad exchanges, not a storefront prerequisite.
OpenRTB-style bid request/response APIs remain the concrete interoperability mechanism.
Search engines remain adjacent advertising infrastructure, not a prerequisite for RTB ad exchanges.
